title: Importing Packages in Java
description: A flowchart illustrating the process and decision-making involved when importing and using classes from packages in Java.
relationships: Developer writes a source file that needs to use a class from another package
Developer chooses an import method (explicit, wildcard, or fully qualified name)
Compiler checks the Classpath to resolve the reference to the external class
Compiler includes the resolved class bytecode for the final program
